title: Aureline critical-dependency register row
description: Boundary schema for one critical_dependency_register_entry_record published by the M1 critical-dependency / import register seed. Each row binds one stable upstream choice or imported byte set to (1) a closed template_class drawn from the runtime_dependency / bundled_asset / build_tooling / host_runtime / mirrored_pack vocabulary so the release-notice draft pipeline can pick a template without inventing one, (2) a closed criticality_class so the seed cannot quietly downgrade a protected-path dependency, (3) a closed publication_targets set drawn from third_party_notice / spdx_sbom / cyclonedx_sbom / provenance_statement / docs_pack_manifest, (4) a closed release_notice_action_class that names what the draft pipeline emits for the row, (5) a non-empty owner DRI and a reviewable fork_or_replace_trigger so protected-path rows can never be anonymous, and (6) a named failure drill the validation lane reproduces under --force-drill. The schema is a register-row contract, not a release-notice runtime: it does not fetch upstream metadata, compute SBOM contents, or publish notice text. It freezes the metadata the draft pipeline keys off so the data model is executable rather than aspirational.

critical_dependency_register_entry_schem.description: Integer schema version for critical-dependency register rows. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

register_entry_id.description: Stable, machine-readable id for the critical-dependency register row (for example cdr.runtime_dependency.renderer_wgpu). Lowercase dot/underscore/hyphen segments only so the id is safe to log, safe in support exports, and safe in release artifacts.

source_register_class.description: Which companion register the row's source_id points into. dependency_register rows describe upstream choices the build relies on; third_party_import_register rows describe copied / mirrored bytes that ship with a release.

source_id.description: Stable id from the companion register. dependency_register source ids MUST start with 'dep.'; third_party_import_register source ids MUST start with 'import.'. The validation lane resolves the id against the named source register.

template_class.description: Closed release-notice template class. runtime_dependency: third-party code linked into a distributed binary (notice + SBOM + provenance). bundled_asset: third-party bytes that ship with the product (notice when imported + provenance). build_tooling: build-input recorded for provenance and SBOM but NOT for third-party notice. host_runtime: required host program recorded for provenance only (never redistributed). mirrored_pack: mirrored upstream pack surfaced via docs-pack manifest attribution.

criticality_class.description: Closed criticality vocabulary mirrored from artifacts/governance/dependency_register.yaml and artifacts/governance/third_party_import_register.yaml so the seed cannot invent a new criticality scale.

protected_path_class.description: Closed protected-path posture. protected_path_critical: the row is on a release-critical protected path and MUST carry an owner DRI and a reviewable fork_or_replace_trigger. non_protected_repo_operations: tooling/host-runtime row recorded for provenance only. non_protected_docs_pack: docs-pack mirror row recorded for attribution only.

license_class.description: Closed license vocabulary mirrored from the companion registers. The seed labels the license posture; it does not adjudicate license terms.

provenance_status_class.description: Closed provenance status vocabulary mirrored from the companion registers.

admission_state_class.description: Closed admission-state vocabulary mirrored from the companion registers. release_notice_action_class = hold_pending_first_admission is only valid when admission_state_class is selected_not_admitted or reserved_not_yet_imported.

publication_target_class.description: Closed publication-target vocabulary. The release-notice draft pipeline emits one section per target; targets that are not listed in a row are intentionally not generated for that row.

release_notice_action_class.description: Closed action vocabulary the build_dependency_notice_seed pipeline reads to decide what to emit for the row. Each action maps onto exactly one section in the draft notice / SBOM / provenance output.

owner_dri.description: Named owner DRI for the register row. Required on every row so protected-path rows can never be anonymous.

fork_or_replace_trigger.description: Reviewer-readable description of the condition that would force a fork, local patch carry, or replacement of the upstream choice. Required so protected-path rows cannot claim a posture without an exit horizon.

drill_id.description: Stable id for the row's named failure drill, drawn from the envelope's failure_drill_id_vocabulary.

forced_input.description: Forced row mutation applied under --force-drill so the runner can reproduce the named expected_check_id from a clean tree.

expected_check_id.description: Exact check_id the runner must report under --force-drill.

actionable_next_action.description: Short reviewer-readable next action when the drill fires unexpectedly.

failure_drill.description: Named failure drill the validation lane reproduces under --force-drill. Required on every row so omissions stay loud.

name.description: Human-readable name for the row, mirrored from the companion register.

publication_targets.description: Publication targets the draft pipeline emits for the row. Empty is forbidden so a row cannot claim notice coverage and then publish nothing.

evidence_refs.description: Evidence refs (companion-register row anchors, ADR refs, design docs) the reviewer can follow to corroborate the row's posture.

notes.description: Optional short reviewer-facing note about the row.

allOf.description: source_register = dependency_register forces source_id to start with 'dep.'.
source_register = third_party_import_register forces source_id to start with 'import.'.

template_class = runtime_dependency forces publication_targets to include third_party_notice, spdx_sbom, and provenance_statement, and release_notice_action_class to be emit_third_party_notice_and_sbom_entries or hold_pending_first_admission.
template_class = bundled_asset forces publication_targets to include provenance_statement; release_notice_action_class MUST be emit_bundled_asset_notice_when_imported or hold_pending_first_admission.
template_class = build_tooling forbids third_party_notice in publication_targets; release_notice_action_class MUST be emit_build_tooling_provenance_record_only.

template_class = host_runtime forbids third_party_notice and SBOM targets; publication_targets MUST be exactly provenance_statement. release_notice_action_class MUST be emit_host_runtime_environment_capture_only.
template_class = mirrored_pack forces publication_targets to include docs_pack_manifest and provenance_statement. release_notice_action_class MUST be emit_docs_pack_manifest_attribution.
release_notice_action_class = hold_pending_first_admission restricts admission_state_class to selected_not_admitted or reserved_not_yet_imported.
